reviews.comment:
Son unos ladrones cada vez que hay cola de autos cortan la cargan y AUMENTAN EL PRECIO DEL COMBUSTIBLE, si señores! Así corren el turismo! Ya saben carguen en Estación YPF SOTO

(Translated by Google)
They're thieves! Every time there's a line of cars, they cut off the pumps and RAISE THE PRICE OF FUEL! Yes, sir! That's how they ruin tourism! You know what to do: fill up at YPF SOTO Station
